steps.title: Identify the consequence of losing MPB
steps.content: The passage states that decreased MPB abundance “has a direct, negative impact on coastal food webs.” This shows MPB are critical to ecosystem function—their loss immediately harms it.

steps.title: Select the word that captures this criticality
steps.content:
”Imperative for“ means essential or necessary, perfectly matching what the passage establishes: MPB are so vital that losing them directly damages the ecosystem.

The other three choices fail because they denote different relationships (emblematic = representative symbol, subordinate = less important, interchangeable = replaceable), none of which fit.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
